title: Mizoram PSC Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 09 Assistant Professor Posts
description: The Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 09 Assistant Professor and Workshop Superintendent Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech, B.E./B. Tech in Computer Science, Civil Engineering, B.Sc., M.Sc.,  MCA can apply for the Mizoram PSC Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can appl...
